defects: Spelling/fidelity: Header: Image shows 'Consultant Radiologist' and 'Kuwait • Healthcare', but does not explicitly state 'Consultant Radiologist — Kuwait Ministry Hospital' as a continuous header.
Spelling/fidelity: Position: Image shows 'Consultant Radiologist (2 openings)' instead of 'Consultant Radiologist (2) — KWD 3,200'.
Spelling/fidelity: Agency: Image shows 'Al-Yousuf Enterprises LI P' instead of 'Al-Yousuf Enterprises LLP'.

Missing fact: Country: Kuwait (the word 'Kuwait' is present, but not in the explicit field of 'Country' as the expected fact; although appears at the top as part of 'Kuwait • Healthcare', if this is considered insufficient labeling)
Visual QA score 78/100 is below the 85 publishable bar
Visual QA: Unjustified large empty space towards bottom right around QR and footer creates mild dead canvas effect.

Visual QA: Visual hierarchy slightly off: 'Earning KWD 3,200' is clear, but the destination (Kuwait), employer, and exact role are distributed over several lines rather than being immediately fused in a powerful headline.

Visual QA: Candidate-facing hook ('Earning KWD 3,200') is strong, but the role/destination (Consultant Radiologist – Kuwait) should dominate visually in a single headline card for overseas recruitment best practice.
Visual QA: Contact CTA (phone/email/QR) is slightly small relative to total space and could be more prominent or better integrated.

Visual QA: Image is heavily concentrated to the right (doctor), but left side is visually and textually dominant (blue zone, heavy text); this leaves overall balance feeling top-heavy and slightly segmented.

requiredCorrections.note: Fuse role, country, and compensation into a single, dominant, candidate-facing hero headline for immediate comprehension.
Reduce dead space, especially around the QR and agency info; rebalance layout to minimize large unused zones at bottom right and between blocks.
Increase the visual presence of the interview phone/email/QR contact CTA pane—the call to action is currently functional but not commanding.
